localizations.title: Mission #07
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Look closely at the air vent in the Oval Office.
localizations.hint_2: The key is nowhere to be found. Find another way to look inside this drawer.
localizations.hint_3_first: Parker is an experienced agent. You will have to join forces to neutralize him.
localizations.hint_3: Take a close look at the puzzle piece on the upper right side. It can connect 2 red pieces to 2 blue.
localizations.hint_5: Sheryl will help you see where the ducts lead from this air vent. Scrutinize this part of the office.
localizations.hint_6: Black elements form a number on the left and the white ones a number on the right.
localizations.hint_7: If you use this ventilation ductwork layout, you will be able to find your way without getting lost. When Jin will be in the ducts, give it to her.
localizations.hint_8: Maybe one of your agents could help you understand these lines of computer codes.
localizations.hint_9: The security supervisor is deeply asleep because he was gased. If you shake him a little, he'll wake up easily.
localizations.hint_11: You need a key to open this door.
localizations.hint_12_first: The mechanism of this ring is the same as on the safes with a combination lock. Pay attention to the clinking.
localizations.hint_12: To open the ring, turn the external ring in one direction until you hear a clinking. Repeat the procedure with the internal ring.
localizations.hint_13: This mini camera can be passed anywhere and enables viewing of inaccessible areas.
localizations.hint_15: Couldn't one of these items help you exonerate one of the suspected agents?
localizations.hint_17: When it is open, this umbrella is an amazing shield. It will protect you if push come to shove.
localizations.hint_18: Place the 3 diskettes on this card and in the right order using the color markers, and align them using the arrows. This will allow you to read a number.
localizations.hint_21: This key must open a door.
localizations.hint_26_first: First off, you must find out who the mole is. To identify him or her, gather all the hints and proceed by elimination until only one remains.
localizations.hint_26: The contents of the drawer, the locker, the slides, the fake passport, and the coded message will enable you to exonerate 5 of the suspects in the file, one at a time.
localizations.hint_28: Only one of these agents would be able to slip in these ducts. But that agent will probably need a hand to reach the air vent.
localizations.hint_29_first: Is this S.O.S. a real call for help?
localizations.hint_29: The security supervisor is still groggy. He meant to say 505 and not S.O.S.
localizations.hint_32_first: If the room is indeed laser-protected, you should be able to spot them.
localizations.hint_32: Sheryl's glasses detect lasers. But who's able to twist between them without a problem?
localizations.hint_38_first: This safe is a reference to a face that is in the hideout.
localizations.hint_38: Once you found the face, "look" beyond the obvious.
localizations.hint_42_first: The red threads link various destinations. Only some journeys are relevant.
localizations.hint_42: The symbols match the stickers on the suitcase. But without the information in the ring, you won't be able to do anything.
localizations.hint_43: Jin gained height, but what are you trying to reach in the Oval Office?
localizations.hint_47: One of you has the required skills to decipher this coded message.
localizations.hint_48_first: The suitcase code has something to do with the stickers. The agent did probably hide elsewhere the information you need about the journeys.
localizations.hint_48: To find the suitcase code, you must use the piece of paper you found in the ring and the shape of the stickers. Each line corresponds to a journey. Draw them on card 42.
localizations.hint_50: To retrieve the diskette, you must find something to keep those carnivores busy.
localizations.hint_56: You will have no use for the diskette if you can't access the floppy drive.
localizations.hint_57_first: The message has been coded by changing the position of the letters. The decryption key will help you to put them back in the right order.
localizations.hint_57: Use the "…" and "!" to properly place the key on the message. You can then observe that each half-circle links 2 letters between them. Swap them.
localizations.hint_63: You won't have time to escape before the blast. Find ASAP a way to protect yourself from it.
localizations.hint_65: Who is the agent who was NOT sent on these three missions?
localizations.hint_66_first: The positioning of these letters on the keyboard are surprising.
localizations.hint_66: Can't you read anything coherent on this keyboard?
localizations.hint_68: This door does not seem very resistant…
localizations.hint_70_first: You will have to handle the nuclear casing. Start by removing the top then the plastic storage tray. Then, refer to the Nuclear Missiles Handbook.
localizations.hint_70: The casing has the exact same dimensions as the box of your favorite game.
localizations.hint_71: Jin must be given a way to navigate these ducts. Sheryl will help you visualize the ducts running through the oval office walls.
localizations.hint_72: Even though this passport is a fake, you learn a bit more about the mole's identity from the first name and enables you to exonarate one of the suspects.
localizations.hint_75_first: This locker is locked but you must find a way to see its content. Also, did you spot the suitcase that is on top of it?
localizations.hint_75: The service dates in Vietnam give you a better idea of the mole's age and enables you to exonerate a suspect.
localizations.hint_78: You notice the torn page from the President's directory but at this distance, it is impossible to read anything whatsoever.
localizations.hint_86: This handbook seems incomplete. Find the missing pages.
localizations.hint_90: This piece of meat really looks yummy.
localizations.hint_91: This piece of paper is the page that was torn from the presidential directory. But who should you call?
localizations.hint_97: Elvis solved the error by changing one of the components. Correctly place this card in the box then follow the track from "OK" up to the heart.
localizations.hint_98_first: This mini-computer from the '70s will enable you to deactivate the nuclear casing but unfortunately, it is not touch-sensitive.
localizations.hint_98: The cable wires seem to match the volume buttons on Elvis's computer.
localizations.hint_99: This indicates how the 3 parts of the Oval Office reposition themselves. The entrance to the bunker is at the intersection of these 3 cards.
localizations.hint_100_first: Appearances can be deceptive. Look beyond.
localizations.hint_100: Use Sheryl's glasses to see the hidden items in the poster. They indicate which tracks to follow.
localizations.hint_200_first: These shapes remind those of the mole's suitcase. They indicate which tracks to follow.
localizations.hint_200: By following the red lines, the shortest distance of each journey forms a number.
localizations.hint_300: You must follow the track from the detonator up to the heart while complying with the handbook's instructions.
localizations.answer_hint_2: To see inside the drawer (2), you must insert in it the mini-camera (13).
localizations.answer_hint_3: Send simultaneously the 4 agents: Sheryl (14), Jin (23), Tommy (20), and Elvis (10).  To neutralize Agent Parker (3) combine the 5 of them.
localizations.answer_hint_5: To see the ductwork, scan with the x-ray glasses the entire Oval Office panorama. The ducts form a 2+5.
localizations.answer_hint_6: The black elements form a 6. The white ones form a 5.
localizations.answer_hint_7: Once Tommy has helped Jin reach the ducts (71), give him the layout drawn by Sheryl (7).
localizations.answer_hint_8: The computer code (8) is a no brainer for Elvis (10).
localizations.answer_hint_9: Ask Tommy (20) to shake the security supervisor (9) to wake him up.
localizations.answer_hint_15: There's a comb in the drawer of the mole's hideout. If you look at the picture, it's obvious the "Lizard" can no longer be a suspect.
localizations.answer_hint_18: If you place the green disquette, then the blue, then the yellow in that order and at the right place, number 26 will form.
localizations.answer_hint_26: After finalizing the process of elimination, the only one left is The Fox. So, he is the mole. Enter his agent code FO2587.
localizations.answer_hint_28: Tommy is carrying Jin on his shoulders (20+23 = 43) to help her reach the air vent (28).
localizations.answer_hint_29: Dial the emergency number 505 on the President's red phone.
localizations.answer_hint_32: Scan this card (32) with the x-ray glasses. It becomes red. Have Jin (32) twist between lasers.
localizations.answer_hint_38: If you scan the poster with the glasses, you will see number 8 on the mouth, 3 on the eye, 1 on the nose, and 9 on the ear. They all refer to the symbols on the safe. Enter code 8319 to open it.
localizations.answer_hint_43: Tommy 's carrying Jin on his shoulders (43) to help her reach the air vent (28).
localizations.answer_hint_47: Elvis (10) is a code expert. Give him this encrypted message (47).
localizations.answer_hint_48: If you take into account the piece of paper found in the ring and the stickers on the suitcase, the journeys are: orange oval (Sydney Opera) => blue square (Mount Fuji) => blue rectangle (the Eiffel Tower) => red rectangle (Kilimanjaro) => red triangle (Statue of Liberty) => purple circle (Voortrekker monument). These journeys respectively form 4, 3, and 2 on card 42. Enter code 432 to open the suitcase.
localizations.answer_hint_50: Take the piece of meat (+6) from the fridge and give it to the piranhas (50) to retrieve the green diskette.
localizations.answer_hint_57: By switching the letters linked by the circular sectors, you obtain: Be careful! The gorilla is suspicious!" As the message was written by the Raccoon Organization to the attention of the mole, it exonerates the Gorilla from the list of suspects.
localizations.answer_hint_63: Deploy the agency's armored umbrella (17) to protect yourself from self-destruction (63).
localizations.answer_hint_65: All the agents you suspected have gone on a mission in France (Paris), Russia (Moscow), and Australia (Sydney)
localizations.answer_hint_66: The "EIGHT" word is displayed on the keypad. It is the computer password.
localizations.answer_hint_68: Tommy (20) and you must knock the door down (68).
localizations.answer_hint_70: The nuclear casing is, in fact, the Unlock! box. Only the bottom part of the box will be of use. Remove all the other components (top, rules, plastic storage tray,etc.). Afterward, use the Nuclear Missiles Handbook.
localizations.answer_hint_71: Once Sheryl has spotted the Oval Office ducts with her glasses, give Jin the layout (7) so that she can orient herself (71).
localizations.answer_hint_72: The male first name on this fake passport clearly indicates that the mole is not a woman. Strike "The Hummingbird" out from your list of suspects.
localizations.answer_hint_75: The jacket in the closet is an indicator that the mole served in the American army from 1965 through 1970. The Hake is the only one to have been a child during that period (9 to 14 years old). So, he can no longer be suspected of being a double agent.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Use the mini camera (13) to see the numbers on the torn page (78).
localizations.answer_hint_86: Pages I (1) and V (5) are missing from the handbook.
localizations.answer_hint_90: By looking at the piece of meat, you can make out a red modifier +6. What can you combine it with?
localizations.answer_hint_97: Starting with the "OK" screen, follow in that order: plain blue line, dotted orange line, plain orange line. Then, enter the correct combination in machine 98.
localizations.answer_hint_98: Use the volume buttons of your device to enter the correct combination in the nuclear casing. The "+" button for orange and the "-" button for blue.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Place cards 5 and 9 next to each other (5 on the left and 9 on the right), then the introduction card centered just below them. You see an "X" form.
localizations.answer_hint_200: If you take into account the piece of paper found in the ring and the stickers on the suitcase, the journeys are: orange oval (Sydney Opera) => blue square (Mount Fuji) => blue rectangle (the Eiffel Tower) => red rectangle (Kilimanjaro) => red triangle (Statue of Liberty) => purple circle (Voortrekker monument). These journeys respectively form 4, 3, and 2 on card 42. Enter code 432 to open the suitcase.
localizations.answer_hint_300: Start with the detonator. You come across a red circle. Follow the red track according to the instructions. You then come across a hollow blue square, so you have to follow the plain orange track, etc. The track stops at the red triangle giving the combination Orange/Orange/Blue/Orange/Blue.
localizations.machine_12: The ring opens. A folded small piece of paper is inside.
localizations.machine_26: Fox's agent code works. The mole is therefore the Fox! To be perfectly clear, it's Agent Parker. You start examining his files so to find out what his next move is going to be.
localizations.machine_38: The safe opens and you find a diskette inside it.
localizations.machine_48: It is the right combination. The suitcase opens.
localizations.machine_60: It works! The walls and the floor start shaking…
localizations.answer_hint_98_1: Use the volume buttons of your device to enter the correct combination in the nuclear casing. The "+" button for orange and the "-" button for blue.
localizations.answer_hint_98_2: Use the volume buttons of your device to enter the correct combination in the nuclear casing. The "-" button for orange and the "+" button for blue.
localizations.machine_60_step_1_hint: The security supervisor can most certainly assist you with the emergency protocols.
localizations.machine_60_step_1_answer: When you wake up the security supervisor, you obtain number 505. Dial this number on the red phone.
localizations.machine_60_step_2_hint: This coded message shows you a number to call. The number of President Jenkins' wife "followed" by that of Edward's, then "eliminate" George's number.
localizations.machine_60_step_2_answer: Kate Jenkins' number (8196) followed by that of Edward's (5723) result in: 81965723. Disregard George's number (9657), 8123 is the only one left. Dial that number on the red phone.
localizations.machine_60_code_4262: You shouldn't add Edward but put him in succession. You must eliminate George and not subtract him.
localizations.machine_98_end:
MISSION ACCOMPLISHED!

The detonator launching nuclear missiles is indeed deactivated. You managed to neutralize the mole and save the planet from a nuclear disaster. Agents Sheryl, Tommy, Jin, and Elvis, the EAGLE agency congratulates you.
